base.full_name.label: Full name
base.full_name.description: Applicant's legal or preferred full name (as it should appear on the application).

base.email.label: Email
base.email.description: Primary email address used for application communication.

base.phone.label: Phone
base.phone.description: Primary phone number (include country code if applicable).

base.address.label: Address
base.address.description: Mailing address or location string the form expects (can be city/region/country if that's what the form asks for).

base.age.label: Age
base.age.description: Applicant age in years. Only provide if explicitly requested and appropriate for the locale/legal context.

other.preferences.work_authorization.label: Work authorization
other.preferences.work_authorization.description: Applicant's work authorization/right-to-work status for the job location (e.g. citizen, permanent resident, visa status).

relative.salary_expectation.label: Salary expectation
relative.salary_expectation.description: Expected compensation for this specific role (number/range; specify gross vs net if relevant).

relative.currency.label: Salary currency
relative.currency.description: Currency for the salary expectation (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP).

relative.start_date.label: Earliest start date
relative.start_date.description: Earliest date the applicant can start for this job (consider notice period and availability).

relative.notice_period.label: Notice period
relative.notice_period.description: Notice period required to leave current employment (e.g. '2 weeks', '1 month', 'immediate').

relative.relocation_ok.label: Relocation
relative.relocation_ok.description: Whether the applicant is willing to relocate for this specific job/location.

relative.remote_preference.label: Remote preference
relative.remote_preference.description: Preferred working arrangement for this job: onsite, hybrid, or remote (if the form offers these choices).

relative.visa_sponsorship_needed.label: Visa sponsorship needed
relative.visa_sponsorship_needed.description: Whether the applicant would require visa sponsorship for this job's location.

base.address.postal_code.label: base.address.postal_code
base.address.postal_code.description: Please provide your postal code for this application (from your address: Munchenstr. 80, 85225 Berlin, Germany).

base.address.zip_code.label: base.address.zip_code
base.address.zip_code.description: Please provide your zip code for this application (from your address: Munchenstr. 80, 85225 Berlin, Germany).

form_of_address.label: Form of address
form_of_address.description: Select your preferred form of address (e.g., Mr., Ms., Not specified). This is a required field in the application.

title.label: Title
title.description: Select your academic or professional title if applicable (e.g., Dr., Prof.). This field is optional.

language.label: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for communication from options: German, English, French.

base.full_name.first_name.label: First name
base.full_name.first_name.description: Value for 'First name' as requested by a job application form.

base.full_name.last_name.label: Last name
base.full_name.last_name.description: Value for 'Last name' as requested by a job application form.

education.major_course_of_studies.label: Major course of studies
education.major_course_of_studies.description: The application form requires selecting your major course of studies from a dropdown. The available options are generic degree types (Associate Degree, High School Diploma / GED, Bachelor's Degree, Master's Degree, PhD, did not graduate high school) and do not include your specific field 'Computer Science'. Please specify how you would like to proceed with this field.

job_ad_source.medium_type.label: How did you hear about this job ad? (Medium type)
job_ad_source.medium_type.description: Please specify how you heard about this Draeger Software Engineer position. The form has a dropdown with options like Magazine advertisement, Newspaper advertisement, etc. What would you like to select?

documents.resume.label: Resume
documents.resume.description: Document upload slot for 'Resume' requested by a job application form.

base.address.city.label: City
base.address.city.description: Confirm or provide your city as it should appear on the application.

country.label: Country
country.description: Select your country from the dropdown list. Default is 'Germany' from your profile if desired.

experience.professional_years.label: Professional experience in years
experience.professional_years.description: Select your professional experience in years for this job entry (options: 0-3, 3-5, 5-8). Please confirm which applies.

experience.professional_years.1.label: Professional experience in years (Previous Inc)
experience.professional_years.1.description: Select your professional experience in years for your position at Previous Inc (Software Engineer, 2018-06 to 2021-02). Options: 0-3, 3-5, 5-8.
